produces.artifact: scripts/lib/eval-stats.js updated with INSUFFICIENT_DATA verdict branch
skills/arc-using/SKILL.md updated with arc-evaluating row in Discipline Skills table

requirement.title: INSUFFICIENT_DATA Verdict When k < 5
requirement.description: The verdict layer MUST return INSUFFICIENT_DATA whenever the trial count for either baseline or treatment in an A/B comparison is less than 5, regardless of observed pass rate. The harness MUST NOT issue SHIP, NEEDS_WORK, or BLOCKED verdicts on INSUFFICIENT_DATA runs. The verdict MUST surface a clear remediation message: "Run k≥5 trials per condition for a defensible verdict." This applies to arc eval ab only; arc eval preflight is exempt per fr-cli-001-ac5 because it checks scenario validity rather than shipping fitness.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given an arc eval ab run with k=3 per condition and any pass-rate delta, the harness verdict MUST be INSUFFICIENT_DATA. fr-vr-001
Given an arc eval ab run with k=4 baseline and k=10 treatment, the verdict MUST still be INSUFFICIENT_DATA — both conditions MUST meet k≥5. fr-vr-001
The INSUFFICIENT_DATA verdict MUST be a distinct enum value from SHIP / NEEDS_WORK / BLOCKED in the JSON output. Downstream consumers MUST be able to switch on it. fr-vr-001
Given an arc eval preflight run with k=2 or k=3, the output MUST remain PASS or BLOCK — preflight MUST NOT emit INSUFFICIENT_DATA. fr-vr-001

requirement.title: arc-using Routing Table Integration
requirement.description: skills/arc-using/SKILL.md MUST include arc-evaluating in the "Discipline Skills — Conditional Triggers" table. The trigger condition SHALL be "About to ship, merge, or mark complete a skill, agent, or workflow". The Iron Law column MUST state "No shipping claim without an eval run that does not return INSUFFICIENT_DATA". Because arc-evaluating then lives in the routing table, the skill's discovery also changes from Meta to Discipline; this is a conceptual relabel only. This routing is conditional, not a global always-on invocation rule.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Given the spec is implemented, skills/arc-using/SKILL.md MUST contain a row in the Discipline Skills table whose Skill column is "arc-evaluating". fr-vr-002
The routing row's Condition column MUST reference "ship", "merge", or "mark complete" so the bounded router can select arc-evaluating when the user is about to claim skill completion. fr-vr-002
The routing row's Iron Law column MUST forbid shipping on an INSUFFICIENT_DATA verdict, closing the loop with fr-vr-001. fr-vr-002
